blocks.text: Match preview: England face India in 2nd ODI (ODI) on Thu, 16 Jul, 2026, 5:30 pm at Sophia Gardens Cardiff. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard ODI surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 250–290 runs par score.
Partly cloudy · High 30°C / Low 17°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 17 km/h. Dry conditions expected — good for batting if the pitch is true.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
